What You'll See in Your Demo

Every demo is tailored to your operation. Here's what we typically cover:

Live Walkthrough

See the mobile inspection flow your operators will use daily — from pre-shift checks to full periodic inspections.

Compliance Dashboard

Watch how CraneCheck tracks 29 CFR 1926 compliance across your entire fleet in real time.

Reporting & Audits

Generate audit-ready PDF reports in seconds. We'll show you exactly what OSHA inspectors want to see.

Fleet Management

Multi-crane dashboard, operator assignments, and maintenance scheduling — tailored to your fleet size.

Book Your Demo

Fill out the form and we'll schedule a time that works for you.

We'll respond within 1 business day. No spam, ever.

Demo FAQ

How long is the demo?

About 20 minutes. We'll customize it to your fleet size and inspection requirements.

Do I need to prepare anything?

Nope. Just show up. If you want, bring questions about your current inspection workflow.

Can I try it after the demo?

Absolutely. Every demo includes a 14-day free trial so you can test it with your crew.

Is there a contract?

No contracts. Month-to-month pricing. Cancel anytime.

Ready to See CraneCheck?

20 minutes. No pressure. Just a walkthrough of what digital crane inspections look like.
